name: Mary Skelter Finale
developer: Compile Heart, Idea Factory, Ghostlight LTD
short_description: The last installment of the dungeon-crawling RPG trilogy reaches its stunning conclusion! Will the Blood Maidens finally get their happily ever after?
detailed_description:
Digital Deluxe Edition

The Deluxe Edition includes:

Mary Skelter Finale digital game
Character Art Collection
Rough Art Collection
Original Soundtracks and Art Inlays (78 tracks total)
x10 PC Wallpapers
x7 Mobile Wallpapers
PC Theme


About the Game

The last installment of the dungeon-crawling RPG trilogy reaches its stunning conclusion! Will the Blood Maidens finally get their happily ever after?

Jail - a living prison for humans, buried 666 meters underground. It appeared suddenly several decades ago, giving birth to monsters called Marchen and patrolled by madness-inducing Nightmares.

A group of prisoners, Jack and the Blood Maidens, were reincarnations of fairy tales who dared to escape. They climbed from the bottom of the tower up to the surface, filled with hope...

But outside were thousands of corpses soaking in a sea of blood. There stood beings known as Massacre Pink, smiling. In that moment, hope was destroyed. The group was torn asunder, with Jack and the Blood Maidens scattered to their own paths.

Separated, they are each drawn to the devouring Jail that floats in the sky...
This is the finale to the tale of the Blood Maidens.

Both the Steam game and Deluxe Edition includes Mary Skelter: Locked Up in Love - True End and Locked Up In Love - Blood High (DLCs in previous versions of the game). Locked Up in Love - True End is canonical to the Mary Skelter series, while Locked Up In Love - Blood High (also included in-game), is a spinoff of the Mary Skelter characters in a school setting.

Please note that the True End and the spin-off, Blood High, uses Japanese voices with the options of English, Japanese, or Traditional Chinese subtitles. The base game will still have English and Japanese voiceover options.

supported_languages:
English*, Japanese*, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
